creator: austinenglish@gmail.com
text:
Wine needs prelink, so that its dll's are loaded at the proper base address
(some security checks depend on this). However, prelink is not available on
FreeBSD (I gave a quick try at compiling, but it failed).

I filed a ports request (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=151190) but it was closed and I was told to file a kern request.

How-To-Repeat: Run `which prelink` :-)
